name: Individual Carrot-Pork Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Micro-cook carrot, onion, and 2 tablespoons water, covered, on 100% power for about 1½ minutes or until tender. Drain.
2. Stir in egg, bread crumbs, oregano, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and a dash of freshly ground pepper.
3. Add pork; mix well.
4. Shape into two individual loaves. Place in a shallow baking dish.
5. Micro-cook, loosely covered, on 100% power for 4 to 5 minutes or until no longer pink, giving the dish a quarter turn and draining off fat every 2 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with cheese.
7. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 45 seconds to 1½ minutes, or until cheese is melted.
8. Serve hot.
